name: platform-parity
description: Platform-foundation P1+P2+P3 smoke suite — the packaged exe's honesty contract (Qualia spec/PLATFORM-PARITY.md). Structural assertions against the desktop runtime: runtime + boot-adapter identity (no phantom HTTP adapter), startup-content parity (shipped 63-node sample, not the inline toy), S-key/Snapshot gating, DebugRecorder honest no-op, dist demo availability, the bind -> mutate -> menu-save -> rebind disk roundtrip, (P2) TauriFsAdapter v2: live hash-based staleness detection + binary/hash/concurrency roundtrip, and (P3) in-webview Import Directory: walkDirectory over a TauriFsAdapter with no node on PATH (the deleted ingest_directory Rust command). Run: canary run --workload qualia-desktop --suite platform-parity --headless. Tests share one exe boot and run in listed order — the read-only identity/startup tests run FIRST; the bind/adapter-rebinding tests (roundtrip, staleness, binary, ingest-in-webview) run last.
